variants: Mei Liu is a dedicated environmentalist and earned her Titanium Gardener Credential to promote sustainable gardening practices. Under the guidance of her mentor, Evangeline Choi, she researched eco-friendly techniques that garnered attention in the Tidepool Shard Review. Mei frequently collaborates with the Curio Pathmakers Council, which serves as her primary funding source for various community projects. Beyond her professional achievements, she is also the Chairperson of Civic Arts Circle, where she seeks to integrate ecological themes into art initiatives.

As Chairperson of Civic Arts Circle, Mei Liu advocates for the intersection of art and environmental sustainability. Mei relies on support from the Curio Pathmakers Council, her primary funding source, to implement creative projects in her community.
